steps.title: Track general to specific
steps.content: The first sentence mentions "certain grains" generally. The next sentence names maize and wheat as the specific grains that reconfigured North American foodways.

steps.title: Reject wrong transitions
steps.content: Choice A signals comparison, but no comparison is being made. Choice B suggests a numbered sequence, and Choice C suggests an alternative; neither fits the move to examples. The remaining transition narrows from the general category to specific grains. The answer is D.
